visual_summary: A massive, high-ceilinged marble hall within the Grand Zodangan palace. The architecture is characterized by opulence and scale, featuring a central ceremonial dais and a throne serving as the Jeddak's seat of power. High windows punctuate the vertical space, one of which is noted as shattered.
layout_notes: Massive scale with high-ceilinged marble architecture; features a central ceremonial dais and a throne/seat of power.
lighting: Brilliantly illuminated high-key lighting designed to showcase wealth and power; subject to atmospheric shifts involving combat dust and smoke.
mood: Shifts from ceremonial splendor to chaotic combat.
recurring_elements: Throne/seat of power for the Jeddak
constraints: Must maintain massive scale and high-ceilinged marble architecture
Lighting must transition from high-key splendor to chaotic dust/smoke during battle
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural details of the "golden ceremonial chains" are not defined.
Exact layout of the palace hall beyond the dais and throne is unstated.
